The Boeing 777 is one of the world's largest twin-engine commercial aircraft and is generally operated with generous safety margins during low-level manoeuvres because of its size, weight and performance characteristics.

The program prioritizes air-to-air variants, envisioning a future where advanced sensor networks, not just aircraft radar, guide these powerful weapons to their targets, redefining aerial combat.

Tina played basketball at California State University, Los Angeles, later worked in education and with Big Baller Brand, and remained a private figure while raising sons Lonzo, LiAngelo and LaMelo Ball. LaVar shared the news during a June 24 livestream, saying Tina "decided to go her own way" while expressing gratitude for the years they spent together.

The court decided that authorities don't need definitive proof of a crime involving moral turpitude before treating returning lawful permanent residents as new applicants for entry. This change simplifies the process for initiating removal proceedings against Green Card holders under specific circumstances, impacting their status upon re-entry.

description: Global market jitters over Middle East tensions have eased following a US-Iran ceasefire, improving the outlook for Indian corporate profitability. Crisil Ratings now anticipates a smaller 100-basis-point decline in operating margins for fiscal 2027, down from a previous 200-basis-point estimate. While most sectors are expected to see minimal disruption, some like airlines and specialty chemicals remain under pressure due to persistent input cost challenges.

title: Gurgaon cop removed from duty after video shows him abusing auto driver who refused free ride
description: A home guard with Gurgaon Police faced immediate removal from duty after a viral video captured him allegedly hurling abuse at an auto-rickshaw driver. The incident reportedly began when the driver refused a free ride, citing a prior app booking. The driver's account suggests the officer boarded his auto and demanded a free trip. Gurgaon Police confirmed the action, initiating departmental proceedings and vowing further steps based on inquiry findings.

Admissions will exclusively rely on CUET UG 2026 scores, offering over 71,000 seats across various programs. Students should prepare their documents and monitor the official portal for application steps, which involve registration, preference filling, and seat allotment rounds. The academic session begins July 21.

title: Watch: Agra BJP corporator cuts birthday cake in drain to protest civic apathy
description: A BJP corporator in Agra staged a unique protest for his birthday, standing knee-deep in a filthy drain to highlight the municipal corporation's alleged neglect of drainage works.  Despite numerous complaints over three years, the drain remains unrepaired and uncleaned, impacting residents and leading to tragic incidents.  Local citizens are threatening further action if the issue isn't addressed.

title: 'Even vice-captains get dropped': Ex-India cricketer's blunt warning to Tilak Varma

Kaif highlighted recent instances like Axar Patel and Shubman Gill losing their positions despite leadership roles, emphasizing that consistent performance is paramount in the current Indian team.  He stressed that every player, regardless of designation, must continually prove their worth to retain their spot in the playing XI.

This humanitarian mission underscores India's commitment to supporting Venezuela during its challenging post-earthquake recovery efforts.

description: The father of murdered Pune realtor Ketan Agarwal met the Maharashtra CM, demanding the death penalty for the accused. The CM assured a fast-tracked investigation and an SIT formation. Investor Michael Burry repeats warning on Palantir after calling stock ‘a sand castle’
description: Renowned investor Michael Burry has expressed serious concerns about Palantir Technologies, likening its stock to a "sand castle" amid a significant downturn.  He noted a "new lower low" with declining trading volume, suggesting a prolonged downtrend.  This comes as Palantir, once an AI darling, faces investor skepticism over its valuation.  Meanwhile, Burry has increased his stake in China's Alibaba, seeing it as an undervalued AI leader.

title: Bill Gates admits to the House panel that he had at least three extramarital affairs
description: Bill Gates revealed to Congress that Jeffrey Epstein attempted to leverage knowledge of Gates' extramarital affairs to re-establish contact after Gates sought to end their association. While no direct threats were made, Epstein allegedly used intermediaries for veiled warnings and explored blackmail tactics. Gates acknowledged past affairs, emphasizing Epstein's lack of involvement and that he only learned of them post-professional ties.

Monsoon misfires: Over half of Telangana districts face rainfall stress, Kharif sowing at risk
description: Telangana faces significant rainfall stress, with 17 out of 33 districts experiencing deficient or largely deficient rainfall less than a month into the monsoon. This shortfall, particularly in key agricultural areas, raises concerns for kharif sowing. While the state's overall deficit is currently within normal limits, the uneven distribution and severe deficits in some districts highlight a growing regional imbalance, prompting calls for contingency plans.

title: Hybrid vs EV: Delhi GoM divided over subsidy plan in new mobility policy
description: Delhi's EV Policy 2.0 faces a hurdle as ministers debate incentives for strong hybrid vehicles. While some see them as a crucial stepping stone to cleaner transport, others insist on focusing solely on zero-emission electric cars. Hybrids, currently a significant part of Delhi's vehicle registrations, offer a compromise for those wary of EV range and cost, but experts argue for a complete shift to electric mobility to meet long-term goals.
